description_long: This is a compact, armored combat tactical vehicle with an angular, faceted hull designed for deflecting projectiles. The vehicle features a sloped front with reinforced armor plating, a small turret on top equipped with a mounted machine gun, and a long radio antenna. Its body is painted in a solid, weathered gray color, showing signs of wear and operational use. The vehicle has four robust, all-terrain tires with visible tread, and a spare tire mounted on the side. Entry hatches, vision slits, and various external fixtures such as side mirrors and handles are present, indicating its functionality for urban patrol and reconnaissance missions.
description: A compact, armored tactical vehicle with a sloped hull, turret-mounted machine gun, and four rugged tires, finished in weathered gray paint.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply angled armor, central vision slits, and the prominent turret with a mounted gun.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the spare tire, side hatch, and the full length of the mounted weapon and antenna.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the angular back armor, rear hatches, and the absence of visible weapon mounts.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the vehicle's profile, including the turret, side fixtures, and the rugged tire design.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible machine gun mount on the roof turret, centrally positioned.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped, welded steel armor plating; thickness appears moderate, with reinforced front and turret sections.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid weathered gray paint scheme.
attribute_tire_type: Four all-terrain tires with deep tread pattern; one spare tire mounted on the left side.
